title: PRIORITY SERVICE FOR VETERANS - 211info
text: WORKSOURCE OREGON PRIORITY SERVICE FOR VETERANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Veteran services include job search assistance, workshops, resume writing support, labor market information, career counseling, and a variety of other helpful resources. Offers veterans priority referrals to jobs and access to employment and training services ahead of equally qualified non-veteran applicants. Locator Salem, OR 97311 Eligibility: -US Armed Forces veterans, including service-connected disabled veterans, recently separated veterans (within 36 months), other eligible veterans who have barriers to employment, and eligible spouses -Veterans with a dishonorable discharge are not eligible Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information and to locate a local Work Source Oregon center (Who Do I Contact?) FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of military discharge (DD214) LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Services: Veteran Employment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - WORKSOURCE OREGON If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WORKSOURCE OREGON
